'''Naeshahn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Brought to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] at an early age after being identified as [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Naeshahn entered the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]] to begin [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. When she was old enough, Naeshahn was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and she began one-on-one training that would last for over a decade before taking and passing her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="AOW" />

Accepting missions and assignments from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Naeshahn was an active Jedi in the decade before the reemergence of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. While she would never learn of the Sith's machinations, she would suffer the ripple effects of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark sider's]] manipulation of events. After taking on young [[Ebor Taulk]] as her Padawan, the pair was dispatched by [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to investigate the disturbance in the [[Yinchorri system]]. Upon their arrival, the Sith-incited violence on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] overwhelmed Naeshahn and Padawan Taulk and they were killed by the war-like [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]]. At the behest of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], the architect of the uprising, [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] and [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]] arranged for the bodies of the Jedi to be shipped to the [[Presidential Tower]] of the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on Coruscant. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] then contacted the High Council in hopes that they would send a larger strike force to deal with the [[Yinchorri Uprising]].<ref name="AOW" />
